column1: # Seed CN -> TW vocabulary / entity list for Tier-2 contextual biasing.
# Columns: tw_term <TAB> cn_term(optional, for reference) <TAB> boost(optional)
# `s2twp` (Tier 1) already handles most generic vocabulary; this list is for terms/entities
# where you want extra decode-time bias, or where OpenCC's mapping is ambiguous.
# Expand for the attendant's own domain (product names, locations, caller intents).
# Taiwan named entities / brands (no cn_term; high boost — OpenCC won't help)
